global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with various shapes and text elements promoting trending content.
global.main_message: Engage with trending content and special offers.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Content area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center with a light red hue, featuring various shapes and text.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: An oval shape in the center of the content area, slightly darker than the background.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape positioned within the content area, contrasting with the background.

elements.label: Small circles
elements.description: Three small circles arranged horizontally, each with a light red fill.

elements.label: Additional overlay
elements.description: Another large rectangular shape in the center, similar to the main content area but with a different hue.

elements.label: Top headline
elements.description: A bold text label at the top left corner reading 'FluxStream' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Trending text
elements.description: A prominent text in the center stating 'Watch what's trending' in a large, clear font.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: A smaller text below the main headline that reads 'New hits every week' in a lighter font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button-like element at the bottom center with the text 'Get offer' in a bold font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in a bright color.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: A small label at the top left corner reading 'UGC' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Extra shape
elements.description: A small oval shape positioned near the bottom right, blending with the background.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The main text at the bottom of the ad, encouraging viewers to engage with trending content.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending Ne Get offer

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, representing the brand 'FluxStream'.

elements.label: Sale indicator
elements.description: A small badge indicating a sale, prominently displayed at the top right.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small decorative label indicating user-generated content, positioned at the top.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bold and colorful, trending content, special offers
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is positioned at the top left, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Watch what's trending, Ne Get offer, FluxStream, SALE, UGC
